tags.name: Чыгуначная вуліца
tags.note: ulica Zaliznyczna is not in Polish... It seems like a strange hybrid between Polish and Ukrainian. In Polish, "railway" is "kolej", so "ul. Kolejowa". Please don't revert this.

tags.name: Roberta Pudnika iela
tags.name:etymology:description: Iela nosaukta 1987. gada 26. maijā nošautā ciema padomes priekšsēdētāja Volda Roberta Pudnika vārdā.
